headline: Today's top AI story: claude-code v2.1.209 released
bullets: Researchers detail "context bombing", where defenders use prompt injections to trigger guardrails of attackers' LLMs, cutting AI hacking success rates by ~90% (Dan Goodin/Ars Technica)
U.S. Sanctions First VPN Service and Malware Cryptor Seller Over Ransomware Support
